      • run

      • getRois

        public ij.gui.Roi[] getRois(ij.ImagePlus imp)
        Parameters:
        imp - image skeleton to analyze
        Returns:
        rois of all the skeleton elements

      • run

        public ij.ImagePlus run(ij.ImagePlus toAnalyze,
                        int nf)
        Parameters:
        toAnalyze - the image to analyze
        nf - the frame number to remove them from
        Returns:
        the image without the center data based on 4 frames

      • getRemoveColoured

        public ij.ImagePlus getRemoveColoured(int start,
                                      int end,
                                      ij.gui.Roi[] rois,
                                      ij.ImagePlus toAnalyze)
        Parameters:
        start - first frame to take into account
        end - last frame to take into account
        rois - the roi array with all rois in the skeleton image
        toAnalyze - the image wo work with
        Returns:
        the centerremoved image

      • removeAndDraw

        public ij.ImagePlus removeAndDraw(ij.ImagePlus imp,
                                  ij.gui.Roi[] rois,
                                  int nf)
        Parameters:
        imp - the image to work on
        rois - the rois from the skeleton image
        nf - the number of frames to remove
        Returns:
        center removed image with the convex hull drawn in

      • remove

        public ij.ImagePlus remove(ij.ImagePlus imp,
                           ij.gui.Roi[] rois,
                           int nf)
        Parameters:
        imp - the image to analyse
        rois - the rois from the skeleton image
        nf - the number of frames to remove
        Returns:
        the image without the center part

      • getTips

        public ij.ImagePlus getTips(ij.ImagePlus imp,
                            ij.gui.Roi[] rois)
        Parameters:
        imp - the image to work with
        rois - the skeleton based rois
        Returns:
        an image with only the extremeties of the hyphae still colored, useful for tracking
